tools.name: search_wikipedia
tools.description: Search Wikipedia for articles matching a query.

query.description: The search term to look up on Wikipedia.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (1-500).

tools.name: wikipedia_search_wikipedia
tools.description: Search Wikipedia for articles matching a query.

query.description: The search term to look up on Wikipedia.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (1-500).

tools.name: test_wikipedia_connectivity
tools.description:
Provide diagnostics for Wikipedia API connectivity.

Returns the base API URL, language, site information, and response
time in milliseconds. If connectivity fails, status will be 'failed'
with error details.

tools.name: wikipedia_test_wikipedia_connectivity
tools.description:
Provide diagnostics for Wikipedia API connectivity.

Returns the base API URL, language, site information, and response
time in milliseconds. If connectivity fails, status will be 'failed'
with error details.

tools.name: get_article
tools.description:
Get the full content of a Wikipedia article.

Returns a dictionary containing article details or an error message
if retrieval fails.

tools.name: wikipedia_get_article
tools.description:
Get the full content of a Wikipedia article.

Returns a dictionary containing article details or an error message
if retrieval fails.

tools.name: get_summary
tools.description:
Get a summary of a Wikipedia article.

Returns a dictionary with the title and summary string. On error,
includes an error message instead of a summary.

tools.name: wikipedia_get_summary
tools.description:
Get a summary of a Wikipedia article.

Returns a dictionary with the title and summary string. On error,
includes an error message instead of a summary.

tools.name: summarize_article_for_query
tools.description:
Get a summary of a Wikipedia article tailored to a specific query.

The summary is a snippet around the query within the article text or
summary. The max_length parameter controls the length of the snippet.

tools.name: wikipedia_summarize_article_for_query
tools.description:
Get a summary of a Wikipedia article tailored to a specific query.

The summary is a snippet around the query within the article text or
summary. The max_length parameter controls the length of the snippet.

tools.name: summarize_article_section
tools.description:
Get a summary of a specific section of a Wikipedia article.

Returns a dictionary containing the section summary or an error.

tools.name: wikipedia_summarize_article_section
tools.description:
Get a summary of a specific section of a Wikipedia article.

Returns a dictionary containing the section summary or an error.

tools.name: extract_key_facts
tools.description:
Extract key facts from a Wikipedia article, optionally focused on a topic.

Returns a dictionary containing a list of facts.

tools.name: wikipedia_extract_key_facts
tools.description:
Extract key facts from a Wikipedia article, optionally focused on a topic.

Returns a dictionary containing a list of facts.

tools.name: get_related_topics
tools.description:
Get topics related to a Wikipedia article based on links and categories.

Returns a list of related topics up to the specified limit.

tools.name: wikipedia_get_related_topics
tools.description:
Get topics related to a Wikipedia article based on links and categories.

Returns a list of related topics up to the specified limit.

tools.name: get_sections
tools.description:
Get the sections of a Wikipedia article.

Returns a dictionary with the article title and list of sections.

tools.name: wikipedia_get_sections
tools.description:
Get the sections of a Wikipedia article.

Returns a dictionary with the article title and list of sections.

tools.name: get_links
tools.description:
Get the links contained within a Wikipedia article.

Returns a dictionary with the article title and list of links.

tools.name: wikipedia_get_links
tools.description:
Get the links contained within a Wikipedia article.

Returns a dictionary with the article title and list of links.

tools.name: get_coordinates
tools.description:
Get the coordinates of a Wikipedia article.

Returns a dictionary containing coordinate information.

tools.name: wikipedia_get_coordinates
tools.description:
Get the coordinates of a Wikipedia article.

Returns a dictionary containing coordinate information.

findings.title: Known-vulnerable dependency (OSV)
findings.description: fastmcp@2.3.0 (PyPI) is affected by CVE-2025-69196: FastMCP OAuth Proxy token reuse across MCP servers

findings.title: Known-vulnerable dependency (OSV)
findings.description: requests@2.31.0 (PyPI) is affected by CVE-2024-47081: Requests vulnerable to .netrc credentials leak via malicious URLs

findings.title: Known-vulnerable dependency (OSV)
findings.description: python-dotenv@1.0.0 (PyPI) is affected by CVE-2026-28684: python-dotenv: Symlink following in set_key allows arbitrary file overwrite via cross-device rename fallback

findings.title: Outbound request to a non-constant URL (SSRF risk)
findings.description: requests.get(...) called with a dynamic URL; validate against an allowlist
